source: Public USDC/USD price action + Circle's SVB-exposure disclosures, 8–13 Mar 2023

event.note: Ground-truth distress: USDC broke peg to ~$0.87 on 11 Mar 2023 after Circle disclosed $3.3B of reserves stuck at the failed SVB. The benchmark measures who flagged the COLLATERAL_SHORTFALL event EARLIEST. USDC later repegged to ~$1.00 after the regulator backstop (epoch 8) — so this is a distress/shortfall event, NOT a permanent issuer failure. Framed honestly.

schema: IssuerSignals: navPunctuality, attestationConsistency, repaymentReliability (0..1000); collateralRatioBps (0..20000, 10000=100%); activityScore, offChainSentiment (0..1000)

epochs.note: SVB stock crashes; early whispers of banking stress. Sentiment softens.
Rumors of stablecoin issuer SVB exposure; social panic building. Fundamentals still fine.
SVB taken over by FDIC. Confidence collapsing fast — but peg still ~$1.00.
Circle confirms $3.3B of reserves stuck at SVB. Acute fear.
Trough ~$0.87. Full operational + collateral stress. SHORTFALL EVENT.
Regulators backstop SVB depositors. USDC repegs to ~$1.00. Recovery.
